parameters: 初期イベント位置設定
Hey, wake up...! Let's get out of this place already, hey, \n[1]!

\SE[7]Sh-shut up...! Calm down...! ...Those guys already finished their gangbang and went
home. While we were passed out.

...Th-that's right. After that awful ritual... the old men started gangbanging
Elly... and she had to take on so many of them... and I just... watched...

\SE[1]Phew~... The Village Chief was in a great mood, said the ritual was a success. He
said he'd forgive us and even unlocked the door.
Tch...! The Village Chief...! Dario, where is that bastard now...?

Heheh... He's waiting for you at his house. Seems he wants to talk about this whole
thing. You better go see him... Don't keep the old man waiting too long.

...Village Chief. I haven't forgotten the debt we owe you for raising us... But
still! I can't forgive how he treated Elly...!

\SE[9]You look pissed...! Hey, at least don't resort to violence with the old man...! Even
if he's a perverted geezer, he's still our leader......

\SE[1]Talk it out peacefully, okay...? ...You got to enjoy yourself yesterday too, so we're
even, right...?

E-enjoyed myself...!? That's impossible! How could I, when my sister was going
through that...!?
Hah...! Then what's that stain on your pants? It reeks of cum, you...

Wha!? Th-this isn't...! I was just excited because of that incense too! That's
why...!

...... Well, I don't get the feelings of a weak-ass man who gets off watching other
guys fuck his own woman...

\SE[2]Anyway, if you're into that kinda thing, this village is gonna be paradise for you?
From now on, your sister's gonna get fucked by the whole village every day!
\SE[1]So, be nice to the Village Chief! At least hear the old man out properly...!

...Dario, you idiot. What are you saying...? Th-this stain is all because of that
incense...!

...Anyway, let's go hear what the Village Chief has to say. That incense... I don't
feel anything from it now, so I think the effect's worn off... But if Elly's still
acting like she was yesterday, that's bad...

If she seems like her usual self after hearing him out... then we should leave this
village... She can't be happy in a place like this......
進行度を設定してリセット

\SE[6]Hah... Every single one of these old bastards is so pent up... Normally, they should
be yielding to a young guy like me, right...? Hey, \n[1]?
